hero.description: Because our hands create, our voices exist, and our stories have value. A space built by and for the queer community.
hero.scroll_hint: This is not just a marketplace

manifeste.d2_text: The refusal to disappear from algorithms.
manifeste.d2_em: The refusal to be a profitable niche for others.
manifeste.d3_text: The refusal to have our creations shadowbanned.
manifeste.d4_text: The refusal that the money from our purchases funds spaces that tolerate us
manifeste.turn_title: Spectrum For Us is the space
manifeste.turn_p1: A place where every purchase goes directly into the hands of someone who decided their identity was a strength. Where every shop is an act of visibility. Where every sale says:
manifeste.turn_p2: A space designed from the ground up for us.

origines.quote_main: We were told our stories weren't worth enough.
origines.quote_dim: That our bodies were a problem.
origines.quote_em: We built a place where that's not true.
origines.fact1_text: of LGBTQIA+ creators report having faced arbitrary moderation on mainstream platforms.
origines.fact2_text: average revenue loss when content is tagged LGBTQ+ in advertising algorithms.
origines.fact3_text: That's the word that comes up most often when we ask our creators how they felt before.
origines.p1: Mainstream platforms are not neutral. Their algorithms learn from millions of biases. Their moderation teams have blind spots. Their advertising rules punish whatever upsets the majority.
origines.p2_before: Spectrum For Us was built so these rules no longer apply to us. Here,
origines.p2_em: the community is the main product.

createurs.title: They create.
createurs.subtitle: Behind every shop, a person who decided their art deserved a space of its own.

items.name: Maëlis
items.quote: I was shadowbanned three times for drawing two men kissing. Here, that's my main work.
items.bio: Digital creations and prints around queer identity, the body, and radical joy.

items.name: Théo
items.quote: My jewellery has a story - it was worn at weddings the law didn't recognise yet.
items.bio: Hand-forged jewellery, unique pieces. Every metal carries the mark of a celebration.

items.name: Nour
items.quote: I started formulating for myself. Because I didn't recognise myself in the products they sold me.
items.bio: Natural formulations for inclusive self-care rituals - made for all bodies, no exceptions.

items.name: Collectif Roseau
items.quote: We publish stories that publishers find "too specific". Too specific for whom?
items.bio: Fanzines, independent publications and queer writing workshops. The margin is a place.

voix.title: What we hear
voix.footnote: Real stories. Voices that chose to stay.

items.quote: For the first time, I bought a gift for my partner without feeling ashamed of the seller's look.
items.name: Sarah

items.quote: In 3 weeks on Spectrum, I sold more than my 6 months on a mainstream platform. The audience here gets what I do.
items.name: Collectif Roseau

items.quote: I grew up in a family that didn't want me as I am. Creating here is a way of saying I exist anyway.
items.name: Théo

items.quote: I wasn't looking for a marketplace. I was looking for a place where my trans-affirming skincare products wouldn't have to justify themselves.
items.name: Alex

rejoindre_cta.title: You create, you care, you defend.
rejoindre_cta.subtitle: Spectrum For Us welcomes all profiles who want to exist in a space designed for them. No need to be a shop - if you have an activity, expertise or talent to share, we want you.
rejoindre_cta.disclaimer: Response guaranteed before June 26 · Free to start

vendre_ici.title: Sell here,
vendre_ici.subtitle: €9.90/month. Online shop. Commission on sales. No conditions on who you are.

args.title: Engaged community
args.desc: Reach an audience that is actively looking for what you create.

args.title: Safe space guaranteed
args.desc: Active moderation, community charter, zero tolerance for hate.

args.title: Visibility offered
args.desc: Editorial features, newsletter, social - your work deserves to be seen.

args.title: Get started in 10 min
args.desc: Online shop, simple tools. No tech, no money needed - just you.

newsletter.title: The newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: New creations, community stories, events - in your inbox, no spam.
newsletter.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

footer.tagline: The first queer marketplace. By and for the community.

subscription.title: Seller Subscription

cart.title: My cart
cart.empty_sub: Explore our shop to find creations that look like you.
